description: Baseline: DecisionModel.build with 5 projections on ~2500 events takes ~1ms
Single-pass optimization: Convert multi-pass filtering (N×events iterations) to single pass with O(1) Set lookups. 9.6x speedup (0.96ms → 0.10ms)
Final optimization: Use Array#subset? instead of all?+include? for tag matching. All tests pass.

asi.bug_fix: max_position was nil for non-empty stores

description: Updated benchmark with correct 50k+ event dataset. DecisionModel.build takes ~27ms with 515 matching events. Ruby single-pass processing is fast; SQL query is the bottleneck.
